server_unavailable: ⚠️ Sorry, the server is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later or return to the main menu.
search_cancelled: ❌ Search cancelled. You have returned to the main menu.
start_intro: 📍 YumMap is your guide to the world of taste and comfort. I will help you quickly find the best places nearby: cafes, restaurants, bars - to suit your mood. To use the bot, you need to set a location (coordinates or city).
enter_search_query: ✏️ Enter the name of the place to search:
text_search_no_results: ❌ No results found for '{query}'. Try another query.
text_search_error: ⚠️ Error while searching. Please try again.
location_received: ✅ Location received! You're back to the main menu.
enter_city_name: Enter city name (e.g.: London, Paris, Berlin)
city_found:
✅ City '{city}' found!
You can now search for nearby places!
city_not_found: ❗️ Couldn't find coordinates for city '{city}'. Please try again.
enter_language: ✏️ Enter search language (format: uk, en, pl, ...):
choose_category: 🔎 Choose a popular category from the list below: {current}✍️ Or simply write your own (e.g.: shawarma, cinema, park).
mood_description:
Need to Work 💻: quiet places suitable for remote work

Date Night 🌙: places where you can eat at night

Loud Company 🍻: places where you can be with a large group

Breakfast at 2 PM 🥞: places where you can grab a quick bite
choose_mood: 🔎 Choose your mood from the list below: {current}
mood_selected_set_location: ✅ Selected: {mood}. Set your location using the buttons below.
settings_save_failed: ⚠️ Failed to save settings to server
coordinates_prompt: Coordinates not set. Please choose a city or send your location first.
add_place_title: 📌 Adding custom places This bot can only search for nearby places. To add and view your own places on the map, use a separate bot: 👉 {username}
search_loading: 🔍 Searching for nearby places... ⏳ Please wait, making API request...
no_location_set: ❌ Error: Location not set! Please click '📍 Send coordinates' button to set location.
how_to_use_bot: To search for places nearby, set your location using the buttons below.
places_error: ⚠️ Nothing found or server is not responding.
select_place: Select a place to open on map:
no_random_places: 📭 Unfortunately, no places found nearby. Try increasing your search radius.
search_error: ❌ An error occurred while processing the request.
comparison_min_2: ❌ Need to select at least 2 places for comparison.
spinning_wheel: ⏳ Spinning the wheel... Please wait, making API request...
spinning_search: ⏳ Spinning the wheel... Searching for random place with your settings...
random_result: 🎲 Random place: Select a place to open it on the map:
loading_comparison: ⚖️ Loading details for comparison... ⏳ Please wait, making API request...
browsing_finished: ✅ Browsing finished. Returned to search menu.
unknown_command: ⚠️ Unknown command. Use the buttons below to navigate.
coordinates_not_set: Coordinates not set. First choose a city or send your geolocation.
choose_search_variant: Choose search option: 🚀 Places - conveniently rate places 🔍 List - view list of found places.
no_favorites_yet: 🌟 No favorites yet First add favorites through search! 🔍
favorites_count: 🌟 You have {count} favorite places What would you like to do?
comparison_select_places: ⚖️ Select places to compare: Click on a place to select it for comparison (minimum 2):
comparison_help_text: Select at least 2 places to compare
enter_radius_range_error: ⚠️ Please enter a number from 1 to 5000.
enter_count_range_error: ⚠️ Please enter a number from 1 to 20.
no_places_with_filters: ⚠️ No places found with current filters.
